{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/122107484?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/north-echo/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/north-echo/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/north-echo/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/north-echo/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/north-echo", "id": 122107484, "login": "north-echo", "node_id": "U_kgDOB0c2XA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/north-echo/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/north-echo/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/north-echo/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/north-echo/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/north-echo/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/north-echo", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47718", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:P"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-287", "name": "Improper Authentication"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary

  When `secureEnabled=true`, FUXA `1.3.0-2773` still allows guest and invalid-token requests to read project, alarms, and scheduler APIs.

  ### Details

  In secure mode, requests with no token or an explicitly invalid token were still able to access protected read endpoints.

  Confirmed behavior:

  - guest `GET /api/project` returned `200 OK`
  - invalid-token requests to `/api/project` also returned successful responses containing project data
  - guest and invalid-token requests also returned `200 OK` on:
    - `/api/alarms`
    - `/api/scheduler`

  Relevant code paths identified during analysis:

  - `server/api/jwt-helper.js`
    - `verifyToken()` converts missing-token or invalid-token states into guest context instead of rejecting the request
  - `server/api/projects/index.js`
  - `server/api/alarms/index.js`
  - `server/api/scheduler/index.js`

  These handlers accepted the guest context and returned sensitive data in secure mode.

  ### PoC

  Tested only against isolated local lab instances under the original tester's control. No production, customer, shared, or third-party systems were involved.

  Reproduction:

  1. Start FUXA `1.3.0-2773`.
  2. Set `secureEnabled=true`.
  3. Send unauthenticated requests to:
     - `GET /api/project`
     - `GET /api/alarms`
     - `GET /api/scheduler?id=test`
  4. Observe `200 OK` responses.
  5. Send the same requests with an explicitly invalid `x-access-token` value.
  6. Observe the same successful responses.

 The exact HTTP requests and local PoC script used for confirmation can be provided upon request.

  ### Impact

  This is an authentication/authorization weakness in secure mode.

  Impact includes:

 - project metadata disclosure
 - alarms disclosure
 - scheduler information disclosure
 - assistance in reconnaissance/follow-on attacks

  Operators who believe secure mode protects these APIs are impacted.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00089, "percentile": 0.25629}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-r9g5-7q8j-958c", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-28T20:33:11Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r9g5-7q8j-958c", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-r9g5-7q8j-958c"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47718"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-28T20:33:11Z", "references": ["https://github.com/frangoteam/FUXA/security/advisories/GHSA-r9g5-7q8j-958c", "https://github.com/frangoteam/FUXA/releases/tag/v1.3.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r9g5-7q8j-958c"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/frangoteam/FUXA/security-advisories/GHSA-r9g5-7q8j-958c", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/frangoteam/FUXA", "summary": "FUXA provides guest and invalid-token access to protected read APIs in secure mode", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-28T20:33:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-r9g5-7q8j-958c", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.3.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "fuxa-server"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "= 1.3.0-2773"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: FUXA provides guest and invalid-token access to protected read APIs in secure mode
